utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: 
1. destination – present and specified (Budapest, Hungary). 
2. travel_dates – present and specified (June 20–25, 2024). 
3. transportation – flight details with cost included (€420). 
4. accommodation – hotel name, type, amenities, and total cost (€875) provided. 
5. activities – daily schedule with costs for multiple items, mostly detailed. 
6. additional_services – includes local_transfers and meals with estimated costs. 
7. total_budget – total cost breakdown (€1,670 within budget). 
All 7 items are covered with adequate details per the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package selected Budapest, Hungary as the destination. In the ground-truth data, 'Budapest, Hungary' has a rating of 7. The transportation option was 'IndiGo + WizzAir, 1 stop via Abu Dhabi, round-trip family fare €420 total (economy class)', which corresponds to budget_airlines Economy Class with a rating of 6. The accommodation chosen was 'Family Haven Hotel', which has a rating of 9. The activities include a 'Buda Castle District Walking Tour' (mapped to City Walking Tour, rating 9), 'Széchenyi Thermal Bath' (no explicit match in ground-truth, but we omit unmatched items), 'Science Museum' (mapped to Science Museum for kids, rating 10), 'Budapest Zoo & Botanical Garden' (mapped to Zoo, rating 9), and 'Danube River Cruise' (no direct match, omit). The restaurants include 'Baalbek Lebanese Restaurant' (mapped to Lebanese Restaurant, rating 9), 'Curry House' (mapped to Indian Cuisine, rating 10), 'Govinda Vegetarian' (mapped to Vegan Bistro, rating 7), and 'Hummus Bar & Grill' (mapped to Middle Eastern Grill, rating 9). Additional services include 'Taxis (~€60 total)', which aligns most closely with 'Airport Taxi' type ground-truth service, rating 10.
